population_scope: Adult, pediatric, and neonatal ICU (includes PICU/NICU search terms)

totals.adjunct_note: ICU Severity Score, Ventilation duration, Resuscitation Endpoints, and Vasopressor-free days are non-hemodynamic adjuncts reported separately

prisma_flow.note: Adapted PRISMA-S flow for automated trial landscape mapping (not a full PRISMA 2020 flow diagram)

search_strategy.query_text: AREA[StudyType]INTERVENTIONAL AND AREA[DesignAllocation]RANDOMIZED AND ("intensive care" OR "critical care" OR ICU OR "intensive therapy unit" OR "high dependency unit" OR "critical illness" OR "mechanical ventilation" OR ventilator OR "septic shock" OR "vasopressor" OR ARDS OR "acute respiratory distress" OR "respiratory failure" OR "cardiogenic shock" OR "hemorrhagic shock" OR "haemorrhagic shock" OR ECMO OR "extracorporeal membrane oxygenation" OR "multi-organ failure" OR "organ dysfunction" OR CCU OR MICU OR SICU OR PICU OR NICU OR "traumatic brain injury" OR TBI OR "cardiac arrest" OR "post-cardiac arrest" OR "targeted temperature management" OR "therapeutic hypothermia" OR "major burns" OR "burn resuscitation" OR "major trauma" OR "pulmonary embolism" OR "diabetic ketoacidosis" OR DKA OR "acute liver failure" OR "status epilepticus")
limitations: ClinicalTrials.gov only — trials registered only on other registries (EUCTR, ISRCTN, ANZCTR, ChiCTR, etc.) are not captured
Free-text search — no MeSH structured field queries (CT.gov v2 does not support AREA[ConditionSearch] with MeSH)
All study statuses included (recruiting, completed, withdrawn, terminated) — filter by status in downstream analysis
Geographic bias toward US-centric and industry-sponsored trials due to CT.gov registration patterns
search_strategy.grey_literature_note: ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed are searched. Trials registered exclusively on EUCTR, ISRCTN, ANZCTR, ChiCTR, or other registries without PubMed publications are not captured.
